title: Convert an AI-Generated Logo into a Clean, Multi-Platform Vector Kit
one_line_ask: Take the client's AI-generated raster logo, clean and de-skew it, isolate the mark on transparency, trace it into a crisp scalable SVG, and derive a full multi-platform vector + raster export kit that stays high-quality at every size and format.

issues: Very slight tilt appears essentially absent or negligible — may be under 1deg rather than the intended ~2.5deg
Background texture is minimal but present
Soft anti-aliased edges present as intended
Wind icon has only two curl elements visible rather than three clearly distinct stacked lines — middle line merges slightly with upper curl
